name: Peanut Butter Sandwich Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together butter or margarine, sugar, and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in peanut butter and vanilla.
4. In another bowl, mix flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and mix until well combined.
6. Scoop dough onto ungreased baking sheets, shaping into cookies about 1 inch thick.
7. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Allow cookies to cool on wire racks before serving.
